title: Pieces for Developers Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Pieces for Developers effectively in coding tasks.

commands.description: Enables streaming output with the GPT-4o model for real-time feedback.
commands.scenario: When you need real-time code suggestions while typing in an IDE.

commands.description: Sets the model's creativity level to low for more deterministic outputs.
commands.scenario: When building a code review bot that needs deterministic output.

commands.description: Limits the response length to 150 tokens to control output size.
commands.scenario: When generating concise code snippets or explanations.

commands.description: Sets the context length to 4096 tokens for handling larger inputs.
commands.scenario: When processing large codebases or documents.

commands.command: Think step by step. Then verify your answer.
commands.description: Encourages the model to reason through problems methodically.
commands.scenario: When debugging complex algorithms or logic errors.

commands.description: Simulates the command execution without making any changes.
commands.scenario: When testing scripts to ensure they perform as expected.

commands.description: Increases the output verbosity for debugging purposes.
commands.scenario: When troubleshooting issues with the AI integration.

commands.command: Use concise variable names for clarity.
commands.description: Advises the model to generate code with clear and concise variable names.
commands.scenario: When generating code snippets for educational purposes.

commands.description: Sets the API key for authenticating requests to the Pieces API.
commands.scenario: When integrating Pieces into a new development environment.

commands.description: Sets the logging level to debug for detailed logs.
commands.scenario: When needing detailed logs for auditing or debugging.

commands.description: Outputs the response in JSON format for easy parsing.
commands.scenario: When integrating with systems that require JSON input.

commands.command: Use comments to explain complex code sections.
commands.description: Instructs the model to include comments in generated code for clarity.
commands.scenario: When generating code for collaborative projects.

commands.description: Sets the request timeout to 30 seconds to prevent hanging requests.
commands.scenario: When dealing with network latency issues.

commands.command: Use Python for data science tasks.
commands.description: Suggests using Python for tasks related to data science due to its libraries.
commands.scenario: When recommending languages for specific tasks.

commands.description: Inject specific local files into the LLM context to provide codebase-aware code generation.

commands.command: Act as a Senior Staff Engineer. Review this code for architectural scalability and potential race conditions.
commands.description: A persona-based prompt engineering pattern to shift the assistant from simple syntax correction to high-level architectural review.
Set temperature to absolute zero for deterministic, reproducible outputs in unit test generation.
Define a persistent system role to enforce specific coding standards or library constraints across a session.

commands.command: Analyze the following stack trace and suggest a fix using the 'Chain of Thought' debugging method.
commands.description: A debugging technique that forces the assistant to map error logs to specific logic flows before proposing code.
